scripts.app:dev: npm run build:mcp-search && npm run build:mcp && tauri dev
scripts.app:build: npm run build:mcp-search && npm run build:mcp && tauri build
scripts.build:mcp: powershell -Command "if (!(Test-Path src-tauri/mcp-servers)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory src-tauri/mcp-servers }" && npx esbuild src/mcp-servers/1c-naparnik.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=src-tauri/mcp-servers/1c-naparnik.cjs && npx esbuild src/mcp-servers/1c-metadata.ts --bundle --platform=node --outfile=src-tauri/mcp-servers/1c-metadata.cjs && npx esbuild src/mcp-servers/1c-help.ts --bundle --platform=node --banner:js="if(typeof File==='undefined'){global.File=class File extends Blob{constructor(c,n,o){super(c,o);this.name=n;this.lastModified=o?.lastModified??Date.now();}}}" --outfile=src-tauri/mcp-servers/1c-help.cjs
scripts.build:mcp-search: powershell -Command "if (!(Test-Path src-tauri/mcp-servers)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory src-tauri/mcp-servers }; cargo build --release --manifest-path mcp-1c-search/Cargo.toml; Copy-Item mcp-1c-search/target/release/mcp-1c-search.exe src-tauri/mcp-servers/mcp-1c-search.exe -Force; Write-Host 'mcp-1c-search.exe built and copied'"
scripts.build:mcp-search:release: powershell -Command "cargo build --release --manifest-path mcp-1c-search/Cargo.toml; $src='mcp-1c-search/target/release/mcp-1c-search.exe'; Copy-Item $src src-tauri/bin/mcp-1c-search-x86_64-pc-windows-msvc.exe -Force; if (Test-Path src-tauri/target/debug/mcp-servers) { Copy-Item $src src-tauri/target/debug/mcp-servers/mcp-1c-search.exe -Force }; if (Test-Path src-tauri/target/release/mcp-servers) { Copy-Item $src src-tauri/target/release/mcp-servers/mcp-1c-search.exe -Force }; Write-Host 'Done: mcp-1c-search updated everywhere'"
scripts.full:build: npm run build:mcp-search:release && npm run app:build
scripts.repack:installers: npm run build:mcp-search:release && npm run build:mcp && tauri build --bundles msi,nsis
